nasb.text: For this is the love of God, that we keep His commandments; and His commandments are not burdensome.

esv.text: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments. And his commandments are not burdensome.

cnv.text: 我們遵守　神的命令，就是愛他了；而且他的命令是不難遵守的，

ccb.text: 因为我们遵行上帝的命令就是爱上帝，祂的命令并不难遵守。

csbs.text: 原来属神的爱是这样的，就是我们要遵守他的命令；而他的命令并不是沉重的，
